name: Reducir complejidad del backend manteniendo validaciones

description: Baseline: 8,852 lines across 63 files. All tests pass, 0 type errors.

asi.hypothesis: Baseline measurement. Backend has 8,852 lines of code (excluding blank lines and comments), 63 files. Tests and types pass. Key complexity areas: bookings/capacity (8+ files), distributed availability logic between schedule and staff.

description: Eliminated duplicate functions: getActiveBookingCountForSlot and getActiveBookingCountForStaffOnDate (duplicates of countActiveSlotBookings/countActiveStaffBookingsOnDate). Saved 31 lines.

asi.hypothesis: Removed 2 unused duplicate functions from capacity-check.service.ts. These were re-exported via barrel but never consumed. Net reduction: 31 lines. No functional change, all tests pass.

description: Eliminated barrel file capacity.service.ts. Updated 10+ consumers and 3 test files to import directly from specific modules. Reduced 1 file and 52 lines of code.

asi.hypothesis: Removed barrel file anti-pattern. Direct imports are more maintainable and eliminate indirection. Updated all consumers across bookings, reservations, citizen, and tests. Net reduction: 52 lines, 1 file.

description: Extracted validation helpers in staff.router.ts: parseDefaultCapacity and validateBooleanField. Eliminated duplicate validation blocks in create/update handlers. Saved 18 lines, improved maintainability.

asi.hypothesis: Added 2 helper functions (9 lines total) but eliminated ~27 lines of duplicated validation logic in create/update handlers. Net 18 lines saved. Code is more maintainable with single source of truth for validations.
asi.duplication_removed: defaultDailyCapacity and boolean validations in create/update

description: Consolidated capacity-reassign-tx.service.ts into capacity-reassign.service.ts. Eliminated 1 file, consolidated related reassignment logic in single location. 12 lines saved after consolidation.

asi.hypothesis: Eliminated split-file anti-pattern. The tx-specific functions were only used from capacity-reassign.service.ts, making the separation artificial. Consolidated ~244 lines into main file, eliminated 1 file. Net 12 lines saved (some overhead removed), but architectural clarity improved significantly.

description: Migrated staff.schemas.ts to Zod. Replaced manual validation functions with declarative schemas. Saved 28 lines, improved type safety and maintainability.

asi.hypothesis: Replaced imperative validation with Zod declarative schemas. Zod provides better error messages, type inference, and reduces boilerplate. Added zod dependency. Saved 28 lines while improving code quality.

description: Migrated citizen-portal.service.ts validations to Zod v4. Replaced manual field validations with schemas. Saved 23 lines, improved error messages.

asi.hypothesis: Replaced imperative validations in citizen portal with Zod schemas. Simplified normalizeDateFrom and normalizeRangeDays. Replaced 4 manual if-checks with single schema validation. Zod v4 provides cleaner API with .issues instead of .errors.

description: Eliminated 3 barrel files in reservations module: reservation-series.service.ts, reservations-admin.service.ts, reservations-instance-update.service.ts. Updated 2 routers for direct imports. Saved 22 lines and 3 files.

asi.hypothesis: Removed 3 barrel files that only re-exported functions from other files. Routers now import directly from source modules. Reduced indirection and improved code clarity.

description: Eliminated bookings-admin.service.ts barrel file. Updated citizen-portal.service.ts and bookings.router.ts to import directly from source modules. Saved 15 lines, 1 file.

asi.hypothesis: Removed another barrel file. Direct imports improve clarity and traceability. Cumulative barrel files removed: 7 total.

description: Eliminated schedule-admin.service.ts barrel file. Updated schedule.router.ts and citizen-portal.service.ts to use direct imports. Saved 22 lines, 1 file.

asi.hypothesis: Removed another barrel file. Total barrels removed: 8. The 56 files remaining are actual implementation files, no re-export-only files.

description: Added toBookingSummary helper in capacity-reassign.service.ts for future consolidation of repetitive booking summary patterns. Helper adds 12 lines but enables ~50+ line reductions in future refactors.

asi.hypothesis: Added helper function toBookingSummary to consolidate repetitive booking summary object creation. File has 10+ occurrences of this pattern that can be replaced in future refactors. Current addition is +12 lines for infrastructure, future replacement will yield net reduction.
